DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Output workspace or script folder path.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Output workspace or script folder path.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Output workspace or script folder path.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source field name to ignore. May be repeated.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source field suffix to ignore. May be repeated.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the MetaRawDataVault workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Create an empty MetaTransformScript workspace when selected module kinds have no convertible modules.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Convert function modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Convert stored procedure modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Convert view modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source MetaSql workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source MetaTransformScript workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
